sys_properties.choices: Serial Number,FQDN,FQDN and Serial,Serial or FQDN
sys_properties.description:
Match CI by Field (Patch)

Choose how to uniquely identify endpoints in your CMDB in relation to their patch statuses: By Serial number or FQDN alone, by either serial number OR FQDN, or by the strict combination of serial number AND FQDN.
By default, Tanium Integration Core's Patch functionality uniquely identifies endpoints by serial number and FQDN. In most cases, this is ideal and results in the best performance. However, some customers may choose to identify endpoints by Fully Qualified Domain Name (FQDN), or by serial number only. Some customers may also prefer to identify endpoints by either FQDN or serial number.

Default: FQDN and Serial
sys_properties.name: x_taniu_tan_core.patch_match_ci_by_field
